cnbc.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'

cnbc.title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund

cnbc.title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart

cnbc.title: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder
